description_long: This is a robust rectangular picnic table with two long benches attached on either side, all constructed from a dark brown material that resembles stained wood or composite lumber. The table and benches are supported by thick, blocky legs and crossbars, giving the structure a solid and stable appearance. The tabletop and bench surfaces are flat and wide, suitable for seating multiple people and holding various items. The design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, focusing on durability and function. The finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture that suggests resistance to outdoor wear. This table is ideal for parks, public spaces, or outdoor dining areas.
description: A sturdy, dark brown rectangular picnic table with attached benches and a solid, blocky design, suitable for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with one attached bench fully visible and the other partially obscured behind the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the table and both benches, emphasizing the table's rectangular shape and the thickness of the supports.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite bench fully visible and the table's support structure clearly shown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the full length of the table and benches, with the central support base visible.
attribute_number_of_legs: two thick central pedestal supports with wide bases
